things.name: Groningen Museum
things.description: Striking postmodern museum on a canal island with art, design and local history

things.name: Martinitoren
things.description: 97-metre medieval tower offering the finest views over the city and surrounding landscape

things.name: Forum Groningen
things.description: Dynamic cultural centre with cinema, library, rooftop terrace and panoramic views

things.name: Prinsentuin
things.description: Formal Renaissance garden in the grounds of the Prinsenhof hotel and museum

things.name: Noorderplantsoen
things.description: Beloved 19th-century English landscape park, heart of the city's social life

things.name: Aa-Kerk
things.description: Gothic church housing the remarkable Aa-Kerk organ and modern art exhibitions

things.name: Vismarkt
things.description: Historic market square with surrounding cafes and the Korenbeurs building

things.name: University of Groningen
things.description: One of Europe's oldest universities with a beautiful academy building and botanical garden

things.name: Hortus Botanicus Haren
things.description: Spectacular botanical garden with Chinese garden and tropical glasshouses

things.name: Lauwersoog & Wadden Sea
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage tidal flats and nature reserve with seal watching
